user.title: BFE Rückliefertarif — Choose utility
user.description: Select your Swiss utility. The preset pre-fills base mode and HKN bonus; you can adjust them in the next step.

system.title: System details ({preset})
system.description: Segment determines federal Mindestvergütung (EnV Art. 12) and Anrechenbarkeitsgrenze (StromVV Art. 4a) automatically. For 30–<150 kW with Eigenverbrauch, kW is required for the degressive formula (180 ÷ kW).

entities.title: Home Assistant entities
entities.description: Pick the grid-export entity (kWh counter) and the compensation entity auto-created by Energy Dashboard (CHF).

error.kw_required_for_degressive: kW required for 30–<150 kW with Eigenverbrauch (degressive formula 180/kW).
error.fixed_rate_required: Fixed rate must be > 0 in fixed-rate mode.
